title: User to Operating System Interface Pathways
description: A flowchart illustrating the primary methods a user employs to interact with and command the operating system.
relationships: User issues commands via CLI (e.g., Bash, Command Prompt) or makes requests via GUI (e.g., mouse clicks). These high-level interactions are translated into system calls by the interface or application. The system calls provide a programmed interface for software to request services from the Kernel, which executes the requests and manages hardware resources.
